prompt: Create a dark cinematic high-fantasy battlefield scene titled Alliance with the Barbarian 4: in the midground, two powerful warriors fight back-to-back as allies, crossing swords against unseen enemies amid dust and flying sparks. On the left is a massive horned demon-like barbarian, bare-chested, extremely muscular, scarred and muddy, with reddish-brown skin, long wild black hair, small curved horns, a snarling face, leather-and-fur loincloth, bone and skull belt ornaments, wrist wraps, and a heavy sword gripped in both hands. On the right is a towering dragon-headed reptilian knight wearing dark layered scale armor and spiked pauldrons, with a fierce open-jawed reptile head, ridged horns, clawed hands, and a sword locked with the barbarian's blade in a dramatic crossed composition. In the foreground, show one fallen blonde female knight lying on rocky mud in blackened plate armor and chainmail, long golden hair spread across the ground, one hand outstretched, a sword dropped near her body, and her face intentionally obscured by a plain solid dark-brown square censor block. The setting is a chaotic medieval war zone with tattered battle banners on poles, distant mountains, smoke, dirt, and a huge army blurred in the background. Use a low-angle epic composition, vertical 2:3 framing, gritty photorealistic fantasy concept art, ultra-detailed armor scratches, wet mud, sweat, bloodless but brutal atmosphere, dramatic backlighting from a bright sun breaking through storm clouds directly behind the crossed swords, high contrast, volumetric dust, sharp focus on the duel, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grading, no readable text.
